commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
Adds publisher-abuse autoban actions and cron scheduling, score-run temporal guardrails, account ban/auth/appeal/email handling, docs/spec updates, and regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for this PR merge ref: the playwright-local-auth CI job fails during local Convex push with InvalidIndexName for the new schema index. Current main does not contain that index or the autoban path, so this is PR-introduced rather than a current-main bug.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A repair worker can mechanically shorten the invalid index and update its call site; maintainer policy approval remains after that fix.

target.title: Auto-ban publisher abuse candidates
target.body:
## Summary
- Auto-ban pending publisher-abuse nominations labeled `potential_ban_candidate` without waiting for pressure-model score runs to finish.
- Keep temporal guardrails for historical backfills and partial current temporal scans.
- Move staff/official publisher protection into publisher-abuse scoring/exclusion, and reuse the shared account-ban path for publisher-abuse autobans.

## What Changed
- Adds `processPublisherAbuseAutobansInternal` and a daily `publisher-abuse-autobans` cron backup sweep.
- Runs autoban processing after publisher-abuse pressure scoring and complete current temporal scans.
- Tracks temporal scoring mode/completion on score runs so backfill or partial temporal scans cannot auto-ban.
- Adds `autobanPublisherAbuseOwnerInternal` to validate the pending nomination and then call the shared account-ban flow with `user.autoban.publisher_abuse` audit metadata.
- Extends reauth blocking, appeal matching, and ban email copy for publisher-abuse autobans.
- Updates moderation docs/specs for publisher-abuse autobans.

## Proof
| Evidence | Claim Proved | How To Check |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `convex/publisherAbuse.ts` | Pending pressure-model `potential_ban_candidate` nominations are enforceable immediately; temporal backfills/partials are deferred. | Review `getPublisherAbuseAutobanEligibility` and `autoBanPublisherAbuseCandidatesPageInternalHandler`. |
| `convex/publisherAbuse.ts` | Staff-linked and official publishers are excluded before scoring/review visibility. | Review `isPublisherExcludedFromPublisherAbuse`. |
| `convex/users.ts` | Publisher-abuse autobans reuse the shared ban implementation and write `user.autoban.publisher_abuse`. | Review `applyUserBan` and `autobanPublisherAbuseOwnerInternal`. |
| `convex/*test.ts` | Regression coverage covers immediate pressure autoban, temporal exclusions, staff/official scoring exclusion, shared ban side effects, auth blocking, emails, cron registration, and appeals. | Run the focused Vitest command below. |

## Verification
```text
git diff --check
bun run test -- convex/publisherAbuse.test.ts convex/users.test.ts convex/auth.test.ts convex/crons.test.ts convex/lib/emails.test.ts
bunx tsc --noEmit --pretty false
bun run format:check -- convex/publisherAbuse.ts convex/publisherAbuse.test.ts convex/users.ts convex/users.test.ts specs/security-moderation.md
bun run ci:static
```

Results:
```text
focused tests: 5 files passed, 176 tests passed
TypeScript: passed
format check: passed
ci:static: passed
```

Not verified:
```text
Convex dev/deploy runtime push was not run from this worktree because .env.local and .convex are not linked here.
```
target.author: jesse-merhi
